prompt: Create a luxury minimalist birthday milestone poster featuring a giant 3D number “[AGE]” carved into a premium ivory-white wall. A stylish person is naturally sitting, leaning, or hanging from the number, posing confidently. Elegant floral arrangements with white roses, baby's breath, hydrangeas, and pastel blue balloons frame the composition. Soft natural sunlight, premium editorial photography, modern celebration aesthetic, clean luxury design, subtle shadows, sophisticated typography. At the top, display the name “[NAME]” in elegant serif font, followed by “CHAPTER [AGE]” and the quote “365 More Days of Miracles.” Neutral beige and white color palette, high-end event styling, dreamy atmosphere, photorealistic, magazine-quality portrait, ultra-detailed textures, luxury birthday photoshoot, Instagram-worthy, shallow depth of field, soft lighting, 8K masterpiece, professional fashion photography.
